questionHtml: Find a 95 % confidence interval for the population mean, giving your answer to 4 significant figures.
markschemeHtml:
(1.463, 1.493)          (M1)A1

Note: If s n used answer is (1.464, 1.492), award M1A0.

[2 marks]
